user_story: As a System admin, I want to add a new tracking mode, so that attendance can be captured through different methods such as ESSP, ACR or manual entry
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Mode screen; When I click Add new tracking mode and define the tracking mode, description and location(s); Then the tracking mode is saved and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to choose whether attendance tracking is based on priority or grace period, so that multiple tracking modes are reconciled correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Mode screen; When I select "Do you support attendance tracking based on?" as Priority or Grace period and Save; Then attendance from multiple devices is reconciled using that basis

user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the grace period and minimum break duration, so that small time gaps and short breaks are handled per policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Mode screen; When I enter the grace period minutes and minimum duration to be considered as a break and Save; Then these thresholds are applied to attendance calculations

user_story: As a System admin, I want to configure supervisor alerts and attendance sheet approval timing relative to payroll, so that attendance is finalized on schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Mode screen; When I set alert supervisor before payroll days and attendance sheet approval after payroll date days and Save; Then the payroll-related timing is enforced

user_story: As a System admin, I want to send reminders to employees who have not recorded attendance via Email or SMS, so that missing attendance is captured promptly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Mode screen; When I enable reminders and select Email and/or SMS as the reminder mode and Save; Then reminders are sent to employees with unrecorded attendance

user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the priority of tracking modes, so that the system knows which device data to consider based on business rules
acceptance_criteria: Given multiple tracking modes exist; When I use the Priority option to order them; Then attendance is evaluated according to the configured priority
